purpose: JSON-safe catalog of app-supported studies and views for deterministic assistant planning.

studies.title: Risk-Adjusted Return
studies.description: Measure return, risk, and drawdown for the active asset.
studies.inputSummary: Active asset from the sidebar, date range, and annual risk-free rate.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Inputs, diagnostics, and export actions for one filtered series.
views.description: Run the current study, review the diagnostics, and export the aligned dataset.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Study-specific charts and rolling views.
views.description: Inspect the last completed run through growth, drawdown, rolling volatility, and return-distribution charts.

views.label: Relative
views.summary: Benchmark comparison against any other dataset or symbol.
views.description: Compare the last completed study run against any other dataset or symbol using aligned overlapping dates only.

studies.title: Sector Snapshot
studies.description: Cross-sectional sector performance by market preset with same-end-date benchmark-relative comparisons across 1Y, 5Y, 10Y, and 20Y windows.
studies.inputSummary: Market preset, focus horizon, focus metric, and annual risk-free rate.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Preset sector universe, benchmark-relative heatmaps, and a sortable focus-horizon table.
views.description: Run a market preset and compare sector leaders, laggards, and relative spreads versus the broad benchmark.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Heatmaps, leadership matrix, and risk/return scatter for the last completed snapshot.
views.description: Inspect the focus metric across horizons and compare sector return/volatility positioning.

studies.title: Monthly Straddle
studies.description: Live snapshot of ATM monthly straddles, implied move, annualized IV, and IV/HV context for the active symbol.
studies.inputSummary: Active symbol, minimum days to expiry, and number of monthly contracts to load.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Front monthly straddle summary, contract table, and warnings for the active symbol.
views.description: Use the active symbol from the sidebar, then compare the next standard monthly contracts.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: IV curve, implied move bars, and liquidity bars for the loaded monthly contracts.
views.description: Visualize the current monthly term structure once the overview has been run.

studies.title: Options Screener
studies.description: Front-month daily options screen for a small preset universe, ranking rich-versus-cheap volatility reads with drilldowns into the monthly straddle study.
studies.inputSummary: Universe preset, bias filter, sort key, and minimum days to expiry.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Preset universe, ranked rich/cheap volatility rows, and direct drilldowns to single-name monthly straddles.
views.description: Run a small liquid universe and screen front-month straddles by IV/HV, percentile context, liquidity, and spread quality.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Pricing mix, rich/cheap leaderboards, and cross-sectional context for the last completed screen.
views.description: Visualize the latest screener run once the overview has been completed.

studies.title: Options Validation
studies.description: Archived screener rows grouped by pricing, candidate, or direction buckets and measured against forward underlying outcomes.
studies.inputSummary: Universe preset, grouping bucket, and forward trading-day horizon.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Grouped forward outcomes from archived screener rows for the selected universe and horizon.
views.description: Use the local screener archive to see which evidence buckets have actually worked in the underlying.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Grouped forward-return bars, win-rate context, and return-versus-move maps from archived screener rows.
views.description: Use the archive to see how validation buckets have behaved visually before drilling into the grouped tables.

studies.title: Seasonality
studies.description: Inspect month-of-year tendencies for the active asset.
studies.inputSummary: Active asset from the sidebar, date range, and partial-month handling.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Inputs, month buckets, and export actions for one series.
views.description: Run the seasonality study, inspect the month table, and export the monthly panel.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Heatmap and month-bucket charts for the last completed run.
views.description: Inspect the heatmap, average month return, win rate, and volatility by month.

studies.title: Rolling Returns
studies.description: Track how rolling 1Y, 3Y, 5Y, and 10Y CAGR changed across historical market dates.
studies.inputSummary: Active asset from the sidebar plus the date range that defines which rolling windows can form.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Inputs, rolling horizon table, and export actions for one filtered series.
views.description: Run the rolling returns study, compare historical CAGR ranges by horizon, and export the full rolling panel.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Rolling CAGR paths and horizon-level comparison charts.
views.description: Inspect how different rolling horizons behaved through time and compare latest, median, and positive-rate reads.

studies.title: SIP Simulator
studies.description: Simulate a fixed monthly SIP across every eligible start month and compare XIRR, terminal value, and cohort spread.
studies.inputSummary: Active asset from the sidebar, date range, and fixed monthly contribution amount.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Inputs, cohort table, and export actions for one filtered series.
views.description: Run the SIP simulator, compare historical start-month cohorts, and export the cohort table.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Cohort XIRR, wealth multiple, and full-window SIP path charts.
views.description: Read cohort XIRR, wealth multiple, and full-window invested-versus-value charts.

studies.title: Lumpsum vs SIP
studies.description: Compare the same total capital invested upfront versus spread monthly across historical start cohorts.
studies.inputSummary: Active asset from the sidebar, date range, total investment amount, and fixed horizon.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Inputs, win rates, cohort table, and export actions.
views.description: Run the comparison, inspect terminal-value differences, and export the cohort panel.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Advantage and terminal-value charts by start month.
views.description: Read Lumpsum vs SIP advantage and terminal-value paths across historical start cohorts.

studies.title: Drawdown Study
studies.description: Inspect underwater depth, drawdown durations, and recovery behavior for the active asset.
studies.inputSummary: Active asset from the sidebar plus date range; output ranks depth and duration episodes on observed market dates.

views.label: Overview
views.summary: Inputs, drawdown snapshot cards, ranked episodes, and exports.
views.description: Run the drawdown study, inspect the worst peak-to-trough episodes, and export ranked events and underwater data.

views.label: Visuals
views.summary: Underwater path plus ranked depth and duration visual breakdowns.
views.description: Use charts to see drawdown clustering, episode depth ranking, and duration concentration.
